name: English Ivan
title: Double Agent
totem: Mr. Mordrake, Bump in the Night

abilities.name: Shadow of Doubt
abilities.text: Melt Into Gloom: When this model suffers damage, it may drain a (soulstone). If it does so, place this model into base contact with blocking terrain within 6".

abilities.name: Thorough and Meticulous
abilities.text: When this model ends its activation, it may choose a Shadow Door marker within 6". Make either a Scheme or Shadow Door marker in base contact with the chosen marker.

actions.name: Gloom Strike
actions.costs_and_restrictions: If the target has an Entranced token, this action receives a (+).

actions.name: Covert Agent
actions.effects: Target gains an Entranced token. Then, make a Scheme marker within 3" the target.

triggers.name: Displacing Shot
triggers.text: Once per activation. Place the target anywhere within 6" of its current location

triggers.name: Foiled Plans
triggers.text: Target must remove an enemy Scheme marker from anywhere in play. If it cannot, it is dealt 2 damage.

triggers.name: Mental Trauma
triggers.text: Target must either discard a card or be dealt 3 damage.

actions.name: Shade Step
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Ally only. Make a Shadow Door marker in base contact with this model and place this model in base contact with the target. Then, place the target in base contact with the made marker.

actions.name: Stick to the Plan
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Once per activation. Another ally only. This action ignores range and LoS. Target declares a (fortitude) action.
